title: Unredacted Files, UFO Disclosures Spur MAGA Hysteria
description: Following the release of unredacted files related to Jeffrey Epstein and the Department of Defense's UFO disclosure, the MAGA movement expresses outrage and demands clarity.

title: The Pentagon Just Released Over a Hundred UFO Files. Here's What We Found Inside
description: More than 170 accounts and videos reveal never-before-known UFO sightings.

title: Pentagon releases UFO files that go back to the Apollo moon missions
description: The Department of Defense has released a fresh batch of images and transcripts relating to reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena, formerly known as UFOs, including pictures and descriptions from NASA's Apollo missions to the moon.

title: ‘Eight-pointed ALIEN’ seen in UAP FILES? Viral UFO footage sparks OPHANIM THEORY frenzy online
description: A newly released UFO video from the United States Department of War is sparking global debate after showing a strange eight-pointed object moving across the sky. The black-and-white infrared footage, reportedly captured in 2013 using a U.S. military sensor platform, has resurfaced through a growing archive of declassified UFO and UAP investigation files. The nearly two-minute clip has gone viral online, fueling intense discussion across social media, UFO communities, and conspiracy theory circles.

title: White House shares declassified ‘eight-pointed star’ UFO video
description: The video is officially described as depicting "an area of contrast resembling an eight-pointed star with arms of alternating length."
